meta.usage: Use patterns[].lineStart/lineEnd to read exact sections with read_file tool

patterns.title: Move Access Control and Authorization Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause:
Move uses different access control paradigms per chain:

- **Aptos**: Signer-based + SignerCapability for resource accounts

- **Sui**: Object ownership + capability objects for delegated access

- **

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Public Signer Capability Exposure — move-acl-001
patterns.rootCause: Public function returns signer for any distributor

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Missing Authorization on Sensitive Functions — move-acl-002
patterns.rootCause: No access control on trading account retrieval

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Role Separation Violations — move-acl-003
patterns.rootCause: OR logic lets listing admin do pool admin actions

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Missing Capability Revocation — move-acl-004
patterns.rootCause: Caps can be generated but never revoked

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Missing Version Checks on State Objects — move-acl-005
patterns.rootCause: Admin functions don't check state version

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Unverified Object/Pool Instance in Operations — move-acl-006
patterns.rootCause: Doesn't verify correct SupplyPool instance

patterns.title: Move Arithmetic and Precision Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause:
Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping. This differs from Solidity's historical wrapping behavior but creates analogous issues:

- Divi

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Double Scaling in Invariant Checks — move-arith-001
patterns.rootCause: Double upscaling in flashloan repayment validation

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Division Before Multiplication Precision Loss — move-arith-002
patterns.rootCause: Division before multiplication loses precision

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Division by Zero in Pool/Staking Operations — move-arith-003
patterns.rootCause: No guard against zero reserve in division

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Rounding Direction Exploits in Share Minting/Burning — move-arith-004
patterns.rootCause: Rounding to 1 causes overpayment

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Overflow in Fee/Reward Calculations — move-arith-005
patterns.rootCause: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Negative Value Mishandling in Signed Arithmetic — move-arith-006
patterns.rootCause: Negative balance converted to large positive

patterns.title: Pattern 7: Faulty Constant Definitions — move-arith-007
patterns.rootCause: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant

patterns.title: Pattern 8: Fee Accounting Denomination Errors — move-arith-008
patterns.rootCause: Fallthrough when deep_quantity is zero

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Payload Front-Running via Public Validation — move-bridge-001
patterns.rootCause: Anyone can call validate_and_store_payload

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Missing Validator Set Integrity Checks — move-bridge-002
patterns.rootCause: Multiple missing checks

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Cross-Chain Message Validation Bypass — move-bridge-003
patterns.rootCause: No validation on incoming cross-chain message

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Unrestricted Cross-Chain Message Sending — move-bridge-004
patterns.rootCause: Any user can send arbitrary cross-chain messages

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Signature Replay in Cross-Chain Claims — move-bridge-005
patterns.rootCause: Valid signatures can be retransmitted

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Fund Loss via Object ID Transfer — move-bridge-006
patterns.rootCause: Gas recipient may be an object ID, not an address

frontmatter.vulnerability_type: reward_miscalculation, solvency_failure, withdrawal_logic, claim_exploit, liquidation_flaw, fee_manipulation
frontmatter.affected_component: rewards, vaults, lending, staking, fee_logic, liquidation

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Incorrect Reward Initialization Timing — move-defi-001
patterns.rootCause: New reward program starts all users at current time

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Missing Solvency Check on Withdrawals — move-defi-002
patterns.rootCause: No solvency check after withdrawal

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Flashloan Repayment Bypass via Double Scaling — move-defi-003
patterns.rootCause: balances_after_flashloan applies upscaling twice

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Excessive Claims via Missing Cumulative Tracking — move-defi-004
patterns.rootCause: Each claim only checks current unlock, not cumulative

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Fee Accounting Mismatch — move-defi-005
patterns.rootCause: Zero deep_quantity causes fee denomination switch

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Forced Withdrawal Tolerance Bypass — move-defi-006
patterns.rootCause: Tolerance check skipped when base is zero

patterns.title: Pattern 7: State Desynchronization Between Modules — move-defi-007
patterns.rootCause: Obligations created without Bank module awareness

patterns.title: Pattern 8: Permissionless Front-Running of Auctions/Orders — move-defi-008
patterns.rootCause: Anyone can fulfill before penalty period starts

patterns.title: Pattern 9: Incorrect Withdrawal/Vesting Abort Conditions — move-defi-009
patterns.rootCause: Assumes amount > minimum_pending_inactive threshold

frontmatter.vulnerability_type: unbounded_growth, front_running_creation, object_limit, division_by_zero, hash_collision, overflow_abort

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Unbounded Vector Growth Causing Gas Exhaustion — move-dos-001
patterns.rootCause: Vector-backed rewards map grows unbounded

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Front-Running Resource/Account Creation — move-dos-002
patterns.rootCause: Anyone can create a primary store at any address

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Event/Object Limit Exhaustion — move-dos-003
patterns.rootCause: Each order cancellation emits events

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Division by Zero in Pool/Epoch Operations — move-dos-004
patterns.rootCause: No guard against zero reserves

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Hash Collision DoS in Address-Keyed Tables — move-dos-005
patterns.rootCause: User-controlled address keys can collide

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Overflow Abort in Arithmetic Operations — move-dos-006
patterns.rootCause: Large amount * fee_bips can overflow u64

patterns.title: Pattern 7: Mint/Rate Limit Exhaustion — move-dos-007
patterns.rootCause: Wrap/unwrap count toward epoch limit

patterns.title: Pattern 8: Missing Parameter Validation Causing Protocol Halt — move-dos-008
patterns.rootCause: Commission rate not bounded

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Merkle Proof Replay via Missing Index in Hash — move-merkle-001
patterns.rootCause: leaf_index not part of the leaf hash

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Flawed Merkle Proof Verification Logic — move-merkle-002
patterns.rootCause: Checks less-than instead of equal

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Unchecked Merkle Verification Return Value — move-merkle-003
patterns.rootCause: Verification result ignored

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Fee Bypass at Maximum Fee Setting — move-merkle-004
patterns.rootCause: Edge case at maximum fee setting

frontmatter.vulnerability_type: stale_price, oracle_update_skip, sltp_clipping, undervalued_collateral, boundary_check, faulty_constant, unauthorized_feed

patterns.title: Pattern 1: Missing Staleness Check on Oracle Price — move-oracle-001
patterns.rootCause: No staleness check on oracle price

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Oracle Update Skipped on Same Tick — move-oracle-002
patterns.rootCause: Update skipped when tick doesn't change

patterns.title: Pattern 3: SLTP Size Clipping via Signed/Unsigned Conversion — move-oracle-003
patterns.rootCause: Negative base position becomes huge u64

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Undervalued Collateral from Oracle Mispricing — move-oracle-004
patterns.rootCause: Simple price lookup doesn't account for LPT mechanics

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Incorrect Price Boundary Checks — move-oracle-005
patterns.rootCause: >= and <= allow price to equal boundary

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Faulty Constant Definition — move-oracle-006
patterns.rootCause: Constant has wrong number of digits

patterns.title: Pattern 7: Unauthorized Price Feed Registration — move-oracle-007
patterns.rootCause: No specific authority verification

patterns.title: Pattern 8: Fixed-Point Arithmetic Sign Bit Confusion — move-oracle-008
patterns.rootCause: from_u256balance conflates sign bit with overflow

patterns.title: Move Token Supply and Inflation Vulnerabilities
Pattern 1: First-Depositor Inflation Attack — move-inflate-001
patterns.rootCause: No minimum liquidity requirement

patterns.title: Pattern 2: Double Minting via Fee Misaccounting — move-inflate-002
patterns.rootCause: kAPT minted for full amount, but APT staked is net-of-fee

patterns.title: Pattern 3: Uncapped Share/Token Minting — move-inflate-003
patterns.rootCause: No cap on xLPT minting rate

patterns.title: Pattern 4: Permanent Freeze Without Unfreeze — move-inflate-004
patterns.rootCause: Freeze exists but no unfreeze

patterns.title: Pattern 5: Improper Mint Limit Reset Logic — move-inflate-005
patterns.rootCause: Incorrect variable reference on epoch boundary reset

patterns.title: Pattern 6: Missing Activation Epoch Check in Staking — move-inflate-006
patterns.rootCause: No activation epoch validation on join

patterns.title: 1. EVM State Persistence Despite Sui Failure
patterns.rootCause: The EVM side commits state changes before confirming the Sui-side transaction succeeded. When the Sui deposit fails (e.g., due to gas issues, module errors), the EVM changes are already finalized, cau

patterns.title: 2. Outbound Nonce Manipulation DoS
patterns.rootCause: Sequential nonce allows targeted blocking

patterns.title: 3. Sui Node DoS Blocks InTx Observation
patterns.rootCause: Single RPC endpoint, no failover

patterns.title: 4. Missing Receiver Module Validation
patterns.rootCause: Receiver not validated before creating outbound CCTX

patterns.title: 5. Improper Coin Type Validation
patterns.rootCause: Partial string match allows coin type spoofing

patterns.title: 6. Duplicate CCTX Re-signing
patterns.rootCause: No check for existing signature

patterns.title: 7. TSS Fund Drainage via Gas Manipulation
patterns.rootCause: Gas coin amount not properly bounded

patterns.title: 8. Wrong Gas Price for Outbound Transactions
patterns.rootCause: Uses EVM gas price model for Sui

patterns.title: 9. Epoch Transition Failure via Duplicate PubKey
1. Public vs Public(package) Visibility Misuse
patterns.rootCause: Functions that modify protocol-critical state (cooldown periods, limits, prices) are declared `public` instead of `public(package)` or `public(friend)`, allowing external modules to call them directly

patterns.title: 2. Missing Owner/Authority Check
patterns.rootCause: Anyone can withdraw from another user's farming position

patterns.title: 3. Missing Object UID/ID Validation
patterns.rootCause: BlueFin accepts any BankV2 — doesn't check it matches the vault

patterns.title: 4. Trade Proof / Capability Bypass
patterns.rootCause: Alternative proof generation path bypasses trader authorization

patterns.title: 5. Flash Loan Receipt Manipulation
patterns.rootCause: Receipt doesn't bind to specific pool

patterns.title: 6. Missing ZK Proof Verification
patterns.rootCause: ZK proof accepted without on-chain verification

patterns.title: 7. Signature Length / Format Validation
patterns.rootCause: No length validation on signature bytes

patterns.title: 8. Security Level Constraint Bypass
patterns.rootCause: Security level check can be bypassed via alternative code path

patterns.title: 9. Unsafe Role Removal
patterns.rootCause: Can remove any member, including the last admin

patterns.title: 10. Repeated Invocation / Replay
patterns.rootCause: No tracking of whether user already claimed

patterns.title: 11. Inconsistent Assert Conditions
patterns.rootCause: Assert condition is inverted

patterns.title: 12. Missing Range / Bounds Validation
patterns.rootCause: TTL not checked against maximum

patterns.title: 13. Mint Limit Exhaustion DoS
patterns.rootCause: No minimum mint amount, attacker can exhaust limit with dust

patterns.title: 14. Excessive Gas Consumption DoS
patterns.rootCause: Order matching loop can process unlimited orders

patterns.title: 15. Snapshot Integrity Bypass
patterns.rootCause: Single admin can override snapshot root

patterns.title: 16. Missing Invariant Enforcement
patterns.rootCause: LP supply not validated after swap

patterns.title: 18. Price Manipulation via Missing Guards
patterns.rootCause: Pool NAV manipulated by direct coin transfer

patterns.title: 1. CLMM Sqrt-Price Overflow
patterns.rootCause: `get_delta_b` computes `liquidity * (sqrt_price_b - sqrt_price_a)` which can overflow when liquidity is large and the tick range approaches extreme values. The `checked_shlw` implementation may also f

patterns.title: 3. BigVector / Container Size Overflow
patterns.rootCause: depth > 0 causes max_slice_size ^ (depth + 1) nodes

patterns.title: 4. Accumulator / Volume Counter Overflow
patterns.rootCause: u64 volume accumulator overflows with high-volume pairs

patterns.title: 5. Type Boundary Overflow (u64 → u128)
patterns.rootCause: amount * PRECISION can exceed u64

patterns.title: 6. RPC / Node-Crash Overflow
patterns.rootCause: (Rust, Sui fullnode): Unchecked subtraction in select_coins

patterns.title: 7. Faulty Constant Definitions
patterns.rootCause: Missing digit — value is 10x too small

patterns.title: 8. Precision Loss in Token Redistribution
patterns.rootCause: Integer division truncates, losing dust

patterns.title: 9. Reward Calculation Rounding Errors
patterns.rootCause: Accumulated rounding dust is silently lost each epoch

patterns.title: 10. Share Price Inflation / First-Depositor Attack
patterns.rootCause: No minimum deposit, shares round to zero

patterns.title: 11. Share-to-Asset Rounding Direction
patterns.rootCause: Rounds DOWN when calculating SUI needed for shares

patterns.title: 12. Incorrect Price Scaling / Conversion
patterns.rootCause: Price feed uses 8 decimals but pool expects 18 decimals

patterns.title: 13. Incorrect Quantity Calculation in Order Books
patterns.rootCause: Uses wrong quantity field in fill calculation

patterns.title: 14. Reward Period Miscalculation
patterns.rootCause: Inclusive vs exclusive boundary error

patterns.title: 15. Improper Integer Type Conversion
patterns.rootCause: Intermediate u128 result truncated to u64

patterns.title: 1. Improper Stake Accounting Updates
patterns.rootCause: The stake update function uses the wrong multiplier or doesn't account for compounding effects. For example, applying a global multiplier directly instead of relative to the user's last-seen multiplie

patterns.title: 2. Tank/Stability Pool Value Update Errors
patterns.rootCause: Updates tank total with deposited amount instead of net change

patterns.title: 3. Surplus Claim Logic Failure
patterns.rootCause: When total_deposit = 0, surplus cannot be distributed

patterns.title: 4. Incorrect Flow Rate Tracking
patterns.rootCause: Inbound flow tracked as outbound (or vice versa)

patterns.title: 5. Wrong Function Call in Integration
patterns.rootCause: Calls wrong flow tracking function

patterns.title: 6. Reward Accumulation During Inactive Periods
patterns.rootCause: Reward calculation doesn't exclude inactive periods

patterns.title: 8. Liquid Staking: Pending Coin Inclusion in Unstake
patterns.rootCause: Includes pending (not-yet-staked) SUI in total calculation

patterns.title: 9. Liquid Staking: Restake Routing Errors
patterns.rootCause: Restake moves SUI but doesn't update validator distribution record

patterns.title: 11. Order Book: Base/Quote Quantity Mismatch
patterns.rootCause: Uses fill quantity where order quantity is expected

patterns.title: 13. Share Price Manipulation via Donation
patterns.rootCause: Pool's Net Asset Value is directly manipulable

patterns.title: 14. Share Price Inflation via Rounding Drift
patterns.rootCause: Every withdrawal leaves dust, inflating share price

patterns.title: 15. Exchange Rate Manipulation at Low TVL
1. UID Leak / Object Identity Bypass
patterns.rootCause: The verifier does not validate structures without a `key` capability. During a package upgrade, a struct that originally lacked `key` can have this ability added. An object constructed with the old ve

patterns.title: 2. Dynamic Field Hash Collision
patterns.rootCause: The `hash_type_and_key` function concatenates `parent`, `k_bytes`, and `k_tag_bytes` without inserting length delimiters. Due to the semi-arbitrary structure of `Struct` and `Vector` data types, two d

patterns.title: 3. Package Digest Collision
patterns.rootCause: Sorting and concatenating without item boundaries

patterns.title: 4. Object Size Limit DoS
patterns.rootCause: max_slice_size too large, leaf objects will exceed 256KB

patterns.title: 5. Kiosk Extension Fund Locking
patterns.rootCause: Disabling extensions locks user funds

patterns.title: 7. Committee / Epoch Management Bugs
patterns.rootCause: member_idx not reset between iterations

patterns.title: 8. Visibility / Ability Misuse via Upgrades
patterns.rootCause: Public function allows arbitrary epoch manipulation

patterns.title: 9. Name Service Validation Failures
patterns.rootCause: ttl not validated against MAX_TTL

patterns.title: 1. Markdown/Control Character Injection in Transaction Rendering
patterns.rootCause: The `renderSignTransaction` function interpolates raw transaction data into dialog text without escaping Markdown characters or filtering control characters. Attackers craft transactions with metadata

patterns.title: 2. Markdown Injection in Message Signing
patterns.rootCause: Raw message content shown in signing dialog

patterns.title: 3. Forced Transaction Signing via RPC
patterns.rootCause: dApp can call signTransaction immediately without prior context

patterns.title: 4. Public Key Extraction Without User Consent
5. User Confirmation Suppression
patterns.rootCause: Account info returned without any user interaction

patterns.title: 6. Key Derivation Path Manipulation
patterns.rootCause: Derivation path not constrained to Sui BIP44 coin type

patterns.title: 7. Development Origins in Production Builds
patterns.rootCause: Development origins included in production build
